prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: KOL-ASRO-EMTENT-SLVR Product Type: TENT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 2 Person Reflective Emergency Shelter Lightweight Waterproof Tent Description: Have you ever been caught outside in an unexpected storm, only to realize you don't have any protection from the elements? You can avoid this unfortunate situation with the ASR Outdoor Emergency Shelter.

Our emergency tent is constructed of high-quality reflective material that helps conserve body heat. It is tear and puncture-resistant and will provide shelter and protection for up to two adults in an emergency.

This emergency shelter is both lightweight and portable, making it a great addition to any bug-out bag or emergency prep kit. It measures 8 feet by 8 feet once unfolded and folds down to just 9 inches by 6 inches so it can easily be stored in a backpack, bag, or vehicle trunk.

The ASR Outdoor waterproof shelter is also super easy to use - simply unfold the tent, tie the shelter with the included nylon rope through both ends to trees or posts and you'll have a tent in no time. It's flexible and windproof so you can count on it to provide shelter in an outdoor emergency or natural disaster situation. Don't get caught in a storm without one of these emergency shelters. Search Terms: ground anchor tarp canopy replacement tent pegs heavy duty camping backpacking tie down metal rust free weather proof titanium Features: - TWO PERSON EMERGENCY SHELTER - The ASR Outdoor survival tent emergency shelter will accommodate up to two adults, providing protection from the elements in less than ideal weather conditions. - REFLECTIVE MATERIAL - Our outdoor shelter tent is constructed of high-quality reflective material that will help conserve body heat. The emergency tent is flexible, waterproof and windproof so you can count on it to provide shelter in an outdoor emergency or natural disaster situation. - LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - This shelter is designed to be both lightweight and portable, making it a great addition to any bug out bag or emergency prep kit. It is is tear and puncture-resistant and measures 8' x 8' once unfolded. It folds down to just 9" x 6" so it can easily be stored in a backpack, bag, vehicle trunk or boat. - EASY TO USE - The waterproof shelter comes with a 20' long nylon rope so you can unfold it and create your shelter. Simply unfold the tent, tie the shelter with the rope through both ends to trees or posts and you'll have a tent in no time. - MULTI-PURPOSE SHELTER - Although the ASR Outdoor shelter tent was designed for emergencies, it's also a great lightweight and portable option for camping and hiking. Since it's so small, it won't' add a bunch of weight or bulk to your backpack or camping gear. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2 Person Reflective Emergency Shelter Tent

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight Waterproof, Reflective Heat-Conserving Material, Compact 9X6 Inch Fold, Includes 20 Foot Nylon Rope

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof, Windproof, Heat Retaining Reflective Material, Lightweight Portable, 8' X 8', Includes 20' Rope
